speaker: Samay
text: Tanmay, ek cheez notice kar raha hoon. LPG cylinders ki price aur supply ko leke tension chal rahi hai, aur cities me log induction stove pe shift karne lage hain. Kya future me Indian kitchens ka system change ho sakta hai?

speaker: Tanmay
text: Change toh already start ho chuka hai. Crisis jab aata hai na, tab habits change hoti hain. Corona ke time pe bhi logon ne work aur shopping ke tareeke badal diye the. Ab energy aur cooking me bhi waise hi shifts dikh rahe hain.

speaker: Samay
text: Matlab cylinder ka importance kam ho jayega?

speaker: Tanmay
text: Kam nahi, par monopoly khatam hogi. Pehle kitchen ka matlab sirf LPG cylinder tha. Ab piped gas, induction aur electric cooking options bhi aa rahe hain, especially cities me.

speaker: Samay
text: Toh ye sirf shortage ka effect nahi, lifestyle change bhi hai?

speaker: Tanmay
text: Bilkul. Jab supply unstable hoti hai aur prices badhte hain, log alternatives adopt karte hain. Aane wale time me Indian kitchen ek hi fuel pe depend nahi rahega, gas bhi rahegi, electricity bhi.
